description_long: This is a handheld Nintendo 2DS gaming console, characterized by its flat, slate-like design with a predominantly white front face and red sides and back. The front features a large upper display screen, a smaller lower touchscreen, a circular control pad, a D-pad, and several physical buttons including Start, Select, and Home. The device has rounded corners and a robust plastic casing, with visible speaker holes and a microphone on the front. The back of the console is mostly red with a white panel, and includes screws, a cartridge slot, and a battery compartment. The side views reveal volume and power sliders, as well as a headphone jack and stylus slot, indicating its portable and interactive nature. This object is designed for personal entertainment and is typically used in handheld mode, making it suitable for use in various urban environments such as parks, public transport, or waiting areas.
description: A flat, handheld Nintendo 2DS gaming console with a white front, red sides and back, dual screens, and multiple physical controls. Its robust plastic build and interactive buttons make it ideal for portable entertainment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual screens, control pad, D-pad, and main buttons, with the Nintendo 2DS logo visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the red edge, volume slider, and headphone jack, with the thickness of the device apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the red and white back panel, cartridge slot, screws, and battery compartment.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the stylus slot, power slider, and additional red edge details.
